CURCIBLE MEETCORE™ · AUTO-GENERATED · DO NOT REPLY

CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED: Microsoft OAuth2 (microsoftOAuth2Api) — Files.Read + OnlineMeetings.Read delegated scope
SETUP_STEPS: 2. Create credentials for each service above
3. Set n8n variable MEETCORE_NOTIFY_EMAIL to the recipient address
5. Disable unused platform branches by removing their connections from the trigger
MICROSOFT_TEAMS_NOTES: Teams saves transcripts as .vtt to the organizer's OneDrive after the meeting ends
Transcription must be enabled in Teams Admin Center > Meetings > Meeting Policies > Allow Transcription
Azure App Registration needs: Files.Read (delegated) + OnlineMeetings.Read (delegated)
Allow up to 10 minutes post-meeting for the transcript file to appear in OneDrive
